improvements: Replace list+pop(0) with deque(maxlen=1000) for O(1) recent-prediction sliding window
Guard /metrics endpoint against calling predict() when _model is None
Initialize optimize_price best_demand/best_new_price before loop to prevent UnboundLocalError
Fix datetime.utcnow deprecation to datetime.now(timezone.utc) across all ORM models
Fix Pydantic Field example= kwarg deprecation to json_schema_extra (eliminated 10 warnings)
Add validated limit param (ge=1, le=200) to /predictions endpoint via Query
Add GET /categories endpoint listing all supported product categories
Add GET /summary endpoint with aggregated DB stats (totals, avg demand, RMSE, drift events)
Add pytest-cov to requirements.txt; add coverage XML upload step to CI workflow
Add 5 new API tests: /categories, /summary, limit validation, cost field, train bounds (37 total)
